title: Jacobi-Anger Expansion
subtitle: Polynomial Approximation of Quantum Time Evolution
description: A self-contained reference on the Jacobi–Anger expansion, the mathematical foundation shared by all three block-encoding-based Hamiltonian simulation methods (GQSP, QSVT, Qubitization). Covers the expansion formulas, their Chebyshev polynomial form, the optimal truncation degree formula, and a visual demonstration of approximation quality.
